code: import{Box,List,ListItem,ListItemText}from'@mui/material';import{useNavigate,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Sidebar(){const navigate=useNavigate();const location=useLocation();const navItems=[{label:'Main page',path:'/'},{label:'Projects',path:'/projects'},{label:'Vacancies',path:'/vacancies'},{label:'People',path:'/people'},{label:'Test',path:'/test'},{label:'Settings',path:'/settings'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Box,{sx:{width:'200px',height:'300px'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(List,{children:navItems.map(_ref=>{let{label,path}=_ref;const isActive=location.pathname===path;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ListItem,{button:true,onClick:()=>navigate(path),sx:{width:'200px',height:'50px',borderRadius:'12px',backgroundColor:isActive?'#C2C5CB':'transparent',color:isActive?'#FFFFFF':'inherit'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ListItemText,{primary:label})},label);})})});}
